title: SRS Protocol Definition (ext:protocol)
description: Declares a staged authoring workflow for a target Record Type. A Protocol names the Record Type it applies to, lists the ordered stages an author works through, and carries per-stage guidance. Protocol definitions are stored as Package definitions (Package.protocols[], file under package/protocols/) parallel to Blueprint definitions — they are not instance Records. The schema is value-centric: stage fields beyond the required set (question, completionCriteria, contributesTo, aiGuidance, outputType) are permitted so that stored protocol files are not rejected by validation.

protocolId.description: Stable UUID for this Protocol. Never changes across versions.

protocolName.description: Machine-readable name within the namespace, kebab-case.

protocolVersion.description: Monotonically increasing version integer within this Protocol's UUID lineage.

protocolDescription.description: Human-readable description of what this Protocol captures and when to use it. Optional.

protocolTargetType.description: UUID of the Record Type this Protocol applies to. At load time the engine resolves this against the Types in the installed Package.

protocolStages.description: Ordered list of authoring stages. Each stage has a unique stageId and an order integer. Stages may declare dependencies on earlier stages via dependsOn. The array may be empty for a stub protocol.

protocolTags.description: Discovery labels. When a Vocabulary in the package declares Terms for a tag key, tags SHOULD resolve against those Terms per RFC-006. Free-string tags are valid when no Vocabulary governs the key. Optional.

protocolCreatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this Protocol was first authored.

ProtocolStage.description: A single stage in the Protocol. Required: stageId, name, order. All other fields are optional. Additional properties are permitted to allow for value-centric stored shapes that carry fields not yet reflected in the core struct.

stageId.description: Stable identifier for this stage, unique within the Protocol.

purpose.description: Short description of the stage's purpose for display in the UI. Optional.

order.description: Execution order. Stages are sorted ascending by this value. Lower values run first.

dependsOn.description: stageIds that must be completed before this stage may begin. Optional — defaults to empty (no dependencies).

question.description: The primary question this stage answers or the action it prompts. Shown to the author as the stage prompt. Optional.

completionCriteria.description: Description of what constitutes completion for this stage. Used by AI and human reviewers to assess whether the stage is done. Optional.

contributesTo.description: The Record Fields that this stage's output populates. Used for guided-capture UI and AI-assisted authoring. Optional.

aiGuidance.description: Guidance for AI-assisted authoring of this stage. Structure is implementation-defined. Optional.

outputType.description: Describes the expected output shape for this stage. Structure is implementation-defined. Optional.

FieldRef.description: A reference to a Field within a Type. fieldId is required; typeId scopes the reference to a specific Type when the same fieldId appears in multiple Types.

typeId.description: UUID of the Type this field reference is scoped to. Optional — omit when the fieldId is unambiguous across the Package.
